hooks.command: jq -r 'if (.tool_input.command | test("(^|[;&|(])[[:space:]]*gh[[:space:]]+pr[[:space:]]+create([[:space:]]|$)")) then {"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "MANDATORY: A PR was just created. Issue work runs through the orchestrator, which owns the review phase and invokes the reviewer automatically. Re-invoke the orchestrator to continue. Do not invoke the reviewer directly."}} else empty end'
